text: Make retries of every Ledger mutation, evidence registration, and Reconciliation Decision safe and deterministic. Evidence: analogous — External Orchestrator can lose output after commit, and repeated email or statement evidence must create no duplicate effects; workflows UC-LEDGER-002, UC-LEDGER-006, UC-LEDGER-013, UC-LEDGER-014, and UC-LEDGER-015.
target: Semantically identical reuse returns the original result with no duplicate transaction, evidence link, decision, attribution, or artifact; conflicting reuse returns a stable conflict and preserves the original outcome.
